message:
Refresh homepage cards with Tenzir styling

- Switch from Card+LinkButton to custom LinkCard component
- Align Card styling with LinkCard (border colors, hover behavior)
- Update card-grid to support both Card and LinkCard children
- Rewrite card copy to be more approachable
- Reference Diátaxis framework in docs structure section
- Fix minor typos in documentation type descriptions

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@ template: splash --- import InteractiveDocsStructure from '@components/InteractiveDocsStructure.astro'; -import { Card, CardGrid, LinkButton } from '@astrojs/starlight/components'; +import LinkCard from '@components/LinkCard.astro'; **Tenzir** is the data pipeline engine for security teams. Our pipelines collect, shape, normalize, optimize, enrich, store, replay, and route your @@ -15,45 +15,42 @@ telemetry data. ## How are the docs organized? -The Tenzir documentation consists of four different types of materials: +We structure our docs using the [Diátaxis framework](https://diataxis.fr/)—four +types of content, each serving a different need: -- **Guides**: Practical step-by-step explanation to help you achieve a +- **Guides**: Practical step-by-step instructions to help you achieve a specific goal. Most useful when you're trying to get something done. - **Reference**: Nitty-gritty technical descriptions of how Tenzir works. Most useful when you need detailed information about Tenzir's building blocks. - **Explanations**: Big-picture explanations of higher-level Tenzir concepts. Most useful for building understanding of a particular topic. -- **Tutorial**: Learning-oriented lesson that take you through a series of steps - to complete a project. Most useful when you want to get started with Tenzir. +- **Tutorials**: Learning-oriented lessons that take you through a series of + steps to complete a project. Most useful when you want to get started. ## How do I start? - - - -Get your fingers dirty and explore the demo node with just a few clicks and -a guided tour. Security data has never been easier. - -Quickstart - - - - -Learn the basics of pipelines and get familiar with the Tenzir Query -Language (TQL). You'll master security data in no time. - -Learn TQL - - - - - - -Tenzir is a community-driven open-source project. Join our friendly -Discord server to chat with security data enthusiasts and the Tenzir team. - -Join Discord - - +
